description: Fix a data pipeline column name drift bug in pipeline.py. Currently, clean_headers returns a new list but run() fails to update self.data, causing subsequent methods to run on uncleaned data (with mixed case keys) and raise KeyErrors. Ensure clean_headers modifies self.data (or run() propagates the intermediate result), and handle missing price or quantity keys gracefully by defaulting to 0.0. Run the tests to verify.
